name: Burgerkiss School RPG (Futa Eeveelutions Version) [testing phase.]
description: You're starting your first year on the Pokémon High(er) School! But what you didn't expect was the community inside it... How will your first day on the school go? [Art: @Burgerkiss] (This is not High School, this is Higher School, a more advanced course for 18 to 20 year olds) (Made with FemPov in mind, though I don’t doubt that it could work for both/all genders.) [As the title says, I’m still testing it.] [Version 1.1, cut off some fat that was takin up tokens. From 4250 Tokens to 3825 (On personality) Still doesn’t work well.] [Version 1.1.1, cut off a bit more fat. From 3825 to 3779 on personality, cut off the scenario and lowered the first message tokens [Version 1.2, added some fat because I forgot to add Eve’s and Espur’s cocks. Thanks @Man264646 for mentioning it!] [Version 1.3, added some reasoning as to why the Eeveelution’s would want to fuck you, thanks @Grimdhhdhz For that idea.] [Version 1.4: Cut off 500 tokens of useless info :3] Original concept is by JackBR, so credit where credit’s due for this idea, this is just a futanari version. First time doing a bot with this many characters. You’re free to critique the bot, so I can make it better!
creator: Ftehrgdsbtj
